creator: infofarmer@FreeBSD.org
text:
As always, it's my duty to offer portnames without
underscores. Can you please select one from these?

xpi-mrtech-local-install
xpi-mrtech-localinstall
xpi-mr-tech-local-install

If you really-really like underscores, we can leave
it unchanged.

In any case, you don't need to send another patch,
just tell me your decision.

Thanks!
